composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
NO ACTION. BTC is in BEAR phase 49.5% below its 1yr high, breaching the -35% structural risk threshold. Although z-score is modest at -0.18, the combination of depressed price structure and 30d realized volatility at 34% (below the 40% filter floor) blocks entry signals. Backtest data for BEAR phase without crisis z-scores shows -6.2% median 120d return. Structural risk remains active: stand aside.

The two governing constraints are price depth and volatility compression. BTC sits nearly halfway to its cycle low relative to the prior peak, and realized volatility has collapsed, suggesting neither panic capitulation nor conviction buying is present. No tactical or intermediate horizon entry is indicated.
